def positive_python_perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_import_heavy_optional_dependency():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_import_heavy_optional_dependency"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Lazy loading. Flag heavy optional dependencies imported at module import time for rarely used features."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
